1021 MIDLINE_DSCHRG_CD MIDLINE_DSCHRG_CD O0110O3C Other: IV Access - Midline (Discharge) CHAR 1 The data in this column indicates whether the resident received midline IV access in the last three days of their SNF stay. 0=No
1=Yes effective 10/01/2023
1022 CENTRL_ADMSN_CD CENTRL_ADMSN_CD O0110O4A Other: IV Access - Central
